full_text:
Cheng Huan
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Huan. Led crossbowman with Zhao Fu but came back on hearing of Han Fu about to surrender. Cheng Huan was affiliated with the Han Fu Dynasty.
